name: Quality Gate (Portable Defaults)
description: Drop-in quality gates with PRS scoring. Override per repo via .quality-gate.json at the repo root.

prs._note: PRS = 100 - (errors*10) - (warnings*2). Files below min_score are blocked.

missing_requests_timeout._description: requests.get/post/put/delete/patch/head() calls without timeout=. Can hang workers indefinitely.

syspath_manipulation._description: sys.path.append/insert/extend calls. Prefer proper packaging or module layout.

mutable_default_argument._description: Mutable or call-time defaults ([], {}, datetime.now(), uuid4()) in function definitions.

cursor_double_consume._description: Same cursor consumed twice (.one(), .fetchone() x2). Second call returns None or raises.

empty_context_manager_exit._description: __exit__ method body is only pass or empty. Resources from __enter__ never cleaned up.

sync_endpoint_with_io._description: Synchronous FastAPI route handlers performing blocking I/O. Blocks the event loop under load.

missing_response_model._description: Route handler without response_model or return type annotation. API contract undocumented.

dependency_creates_resource._description: Depends() function creating heavy resources (engines, clients) per-request. Causes pool exhaustion.

unvalidated_parameters._description: Path/Query params with suggestive names (id, page, limit) but no Field constraints.

bare_exception_in_route._description: Broad except in route handler without logging or re-raise. Invisible failures in production.

missing_cors_config._description: FastAPI app without CORSMiddleware. Frontend requests blocked. Wildcard origins flagged as error.

error_response_as_200._description: Flask-style tuple return (dict, status) in FastAPI route. Status code ignored, sends 200.

missing_auth_middleware._description: Route handler without auth dependency. Publicly accessible endpoint.

discarded_query_result._description: DB query expression without assignment or return. Query result silently discarded.

unbounded_graph_execution._description: StateGraph.compile() without recursion_limit or AgentExecutor without max_iterations. Infinite loops burn tokens.

missing_callbacks._description: .invoke/.stream calls without callbacks parameter. No production observability.

hardcoded_model_name._description: LLM class instantiated with string literal model name. Cannot switch models without code change.

missing_retry_fallback._description: LLM invocation without .with_retry() or .with_fallback(). Transient failures crash the app.

unstructured_output_parsing._description: LLM output parsed with .split()/.strip()/regex instead of .with_structured_output() or PydanticOutputParser.

missing_token_tracking._description: LLM calls without token/cost tracking (get_openai_callback, LangSmith, etc.). Cost visibility missing.

prompt_injection_vector._description: f-string or .format() in PromptTemplate/ChatPromptTemplate. Prompt injection vulnerability.

dead_variable._description: Variable assigned but never read in function scope. Common in AI-generated code.

nested_enumeration._description: Nested for-loop over static collection. O(n²) when an index/set lookup would be O(n).

linear_search_in_loop._description: 'if x in list' inside loop. O(m×n) — convert list to set for O(1) lookups.

redundant_recomputation._description: Same function call with identical args repeated in function. Compute once and reuse.

dead_parameters._description: Function parameter never referenced in body. Indicates incomplete refactoring.

unbounded_cypher_query._description: MATCH/RETURN without LIMIT. Unbounded query can exhaust database memory.

cypher_cartesian_product._description: Disconnected MATCH patterns create explosive cartesian products.

cypher_string_interpolation._description: f-string or .format() in Cypher query. Cypher injection risk.

sync_neo4j_in_async._description: Synchronous neo4j.GraphDatabase in file with async functions. Blocks event loop.

missing_write_transaction._description: Write Cypher via session.run() bypasses automatic retry. Use execute_write().

session_not_closed._description: driver.session() without context manager. Leaks connections.

unbounded_find._description: .find() without .limit(). Can exhaust memory on large collections.

pymongo_in_async._description: Synchronous pymongo in async context. Use motor.motor_asyncio instead.

missing_projection._description: .find()/.find_one() without projection. Fetches all fields unnecessarily.

unbounded_array_push._description: $push without $slice. Array grows unbounded toward 16MB document limit.

connection_string_in_code._description: Hardcoded database connection URI in source code. Use environment variables.

per_request_connection._description: DB client/connection created inside route handler. Pool exhaustion risk.

missing_connection_retry._description: Database connection init without retry or error handling.

mixed_sync_async_drivers._description: Both sync and async database drivers in same file. Architectural inconsistency.

missing_health_check._description: FastAPI app with database but no /health endpoint for connectivity checks.

db_call_in_loop._description: Database query inside for loop. N+1 pattern — use batch query instead.

missing_pagination._description: Route handler returns DB results without limit/offset pagination parameters.

ssrf_potential._description: User-supplied URL passed to HTTP client without validation. SSRF risk.

nested_collection_iteration._description: Nested for-loops over collections. O(n*m) complexity degrades with data size.

string_concat_in_loop._description: String += inside loop. Quadratic memory allocation — use list + join.

regex_compile_in_loop._description: re.search/match/sub called inside loop. Pattern recompiled each iteration.

unbounded_polling_loop._description: while True with HTTP/sleep calls but no retry counter. Infinite loop risk.

large_response_materialization._description: list(query) or .all() in route handler without pagination. Loads entire dataset into memory.

sync_session_in_async._description: Synchronous sqlalchemy Session in file with async functions. Use AsyncSession.

raw_sql_preference._description: session.execute(text(...)) for standard CRUD. Consider ORM query builder.

n_plus_one_signal._description: DB query call inside loop over query results. N+1 query pattern.

missing_alembic._description: SQLAlchemy models defined but no alembic/ directory. Schema migrations not tracked.

sync_orm_in_async_handler._description: Synchronous ORM calls (.commit, .execute, .query) inside async functions. Blocks event loop.

unsafe_module_singleton._description: Module-level class instance with mutable state (self.cache={}). Thread-unsafe under concurrent load.

missing_confidence_filter._description: Parsing results used without confidence threshold check. Silent incorrect data.

unbounded_document_processing._description: Document parsing API called without file size validation. Cost and latency risk.

sync_parsing_in_handler._description: Long-running document parsing directly in HTTP route handler.

missing_parse_cache._description: Document parsing without caching. Re-parsing identical documents wastes money.

useeffect_dependency_array._description: useEffect with missing or empty dependency array. Causes stale closures or infinite re-renders.

server_client_boundary._description: Client hooks (useState, useEffect) in server component without 'use client' directive.

missing_error_boundary._description: page.tsx without error.tsx. Component errors show blank screen.

unoptimised_images._description: Raw tag in Next.js app. Use next/image for optimisation.

env_variable_exposure._description: os.environ logged, printed, or returned. Exposes secrets.

missing_rate_limiting._description: FastAPI app without rate limiting. WARNING for AI-powered APIs.

secret_in_env_default._description: os.getenv('SECRET', 'real-value') — live secrets as fallback defaults. Persists in git history.

empty_security_config._description: SECRET_KEY = '' or JWT_SECRET = ''. Empty security keys effectively disable security.

sql_string_interpolation._description: SQL query built with f-string or .format() — SQL injection risk.

sensitive_data_in_logs._description: Variables named token/secret/password passed to logging or print calls.

client_exposed_secret._description: NEXT_PUBLIC_/REACT_APP_/VITE_ variables containing SECRET/KEY/PASSWORD. Bundled into client JS.

excessive_defensive_checks._description: Function where >30% of statements are isinstance/hasattr/None checks.

over_abstraction._description: ABC/Protocol with only one concrete subclass. Unnecessary indirection.

redundant_containment_check._description: Containment checks in bottom-up tree processing. Already-assigned items rechecked.

code_to_complexity_ratio._description: Module with >5:1 private-to-public function ratio or >200 lines per public function.

missing_structured_logging._description: print() used for logging (3+ calls) instead of logging/structlog. Not queryable or filterable.

missing_request_tracing._description: FastAPI app without request_id/correlation_id middleware. Cannot correlate errors across services.

missing_error_telemetry._description: Exception handler without logging or error telemetry. Errors invisible in monitoring.

missing_health_endpoint._description: FastAPI app without /health or /healthz route. Load balancers cannot probe service health.

generic_error_response._description: Route returning generic error dict without error_code/status. UI gets no actionable info.

missing_error_boundary_ux._description: React component file without ErrorBoundary. Render errors crash entire component tree.

unhandled_promise_rejection._description: .then() without .catch(), async handler without try/catch. Silent UI failures.

missing_await._description: Async LLM/API calls (openai, anthropic, aiohttp) that are missing await. Returns coroutine instead of result.

llm_timeout._description: LLM API calls without explicit timeout. Can hang indefinitely causing production issues.

llm_retry._description: LLM calls without retry mechanism (tenacity/backoff). Transient failures will crash the app.

unbounded_tokens._description: LLM calls without max_tokens limit. Response length unbounded, unpredictable cost.

prompt_injection_risk._description: User input directly interpolated into prompts via f-strings. Prompt injection vulnerability.

blocking_in_async._description: Blocking calls (time.sleep, requests.get, open) inside async functions. Blocks event loop.

llm_response_handling._description: LLM API calls without try/except. API errors crash the application.

rate_limit_handling._description: Files using LLM APIs without 429/RateLimitError handling. Will fail under load.

hardcoded_model._description: Hardcoded LLM model names (gpt-4, claude-3). Should be configurable for updates/testing.

graceful_degradation._description: LLM-dependent code without fallback behavior. Features fail completely when LLM unavailable.

json_response_validation._description: JSON parsing of LLM responses without schema validation (Pydantic). Malformed JSON crashes app.

large_prompt_handling._description: Unbounded file/document content sent to LLM without chunking. Token limit exceeded errors.
